title: Jurerê Internacional pilot — first two weeks
author: marcelo.base.eth
summary: Initial pilot results from AguasPuras sample collection in Jurerê Internacional, Florianópolis. Baseline readings across 12 coastal and 6 tap-water points during the first two weeks of April 2026. No E. coli excursions above CONAMA 274/2000 thresholds detected in the period covered, but fluoride levels in two tap-water points trended above the Portaria GM/MS 888/2021 target.
